brutal_honesty_flags: Stored wall_progress_pct was 92 %% inflated; machine-derived is 50 %%. Gate audit and auto_sync now both agree. -42pp honest correction landed.
ALM-P4-4 32B status=in_progress was a ghost (pod tubq terminated without R2 artifact). Closed as superseded_by_14b per decisions.json SSOT.
CLM-7B phase is planned but preconditions (A7 3B completion) are 10-14 days out minimum. v3.0 CLM ETA 2026-05-14 assumes no interruption.
Sub-roadmap option states stuck at 'chosen' despite evidence meeting ossification thresholds — sync harness is not promoting validated state changes to phase-level.
Tool-use gate PASSED on lenient judge (synonym+stemmer); deterministic strict baseline was 0.811/0.533. r9 canonical; r10 regressed on completion_rate.
15 new RunPod bugs ossified today raise the silent-failure-mode registry from 17 to 32 — more than doubles the known failure catalog in a single session.
